news.title: 🇫🇷 telegram founder pavel durov: france, under the leadership of emmanuel macron "is losing legitima
news.summary:
🇫🇷 telegram founder pavel durov: france, under the leadership of emmanuel macron "is losing legitimacy"

elon musk has been summoned again for questioning by the paris prosecutor's office in connection with allegations of distributing illegal sexualized images.

according to the times, the questioning is considered "voluntary," and the prosecutor's office has also summoned linda yaccarino, the former ceo of x, the social media platform owned by musk.

this procedure was initiated as part of a case opened earlier last year regarding the distribution of illegal sexualized images and deepfakes on the social media platform. the allegations are based on the premise that grok may be capable of generating sexualized images.

the authorities have not specified whETHer musk will face penalties if he fails to appear for questioning, but they noted that his absence will not halt the investigation.

according to the newspaper, other employees of x are expected to be summoned for questioning this week.

meanwhile, pavel durov, against whom french authorities have also brought several charges, stated that france, under the leadership of emmanuel macron, "is losing legitimacy because it is using criminal investigations to suppress freedom of speech and privacy."

news.title:
review: how justin sun-linked 지갑 swiftly withdraws $274m usdt from aave after market freeze

just 21
news.summary:
review: how justin sun-linked 지갑 swiftly withdraws $274m usdt from aave after market freeze

just 21 minutes after aave froze the rsETH/wrsETH market on april 18 at 18:52 utc, the htx: recovery 지갑 — controlled by justin sun’s team — executed a rapid exit.

between 19:12 and 19:17 utc, the 지갑 completed five transactions, withdrawing a total of $274 million in usdt and fully clearing its stable코인 position on the protocol.

aave has since paused withdrawals platform-wide. other large holders are now forced to swap into alternative assets and exit via decentralized 거래소s, often at a discount.

sources: intel.arkm.com/explorer/enti… nitter.net/embercn/status/2046411…

news.title:
total market cap of 토큰ized rwas skyrockets 20x in three years

according to a recent 암호화폐politan rep
news.summary:
total market cap of 토큰ized rwas skyrockets 20x in three years

according to a recent 암호화폐politan report, the rwa 토큰ization market cap has grown nearly 20x over the past three years, exceeding $29 billion. a poll indicates that 34.7% of respondents have allocated to 토큰ized assets, while about 45% are observing or awaiting clearer regulations. 

토큰ized us treasuries account for nearly half of the market, followed by commodities exceeding $5 billion. additionally, 토큰ized stocks emerged as the fastest-growing category, with its market cap rising from $374 million to $982 million and holders increasing from roughly 2,000 to over 207,000.

news.title:
kelp attributes rsETH incident to layerzero infrastructure breach

kelp stated that the april 18 rsE
news.summary:
kelp attributes rsETH incident to layerzero infrastructure breach

kelp stated that the april 18 rsETH incident stemmed from a compromise of two layerzero rpc nodes and a ddos attack on a third, enabling the attacker to drain assets from the bridge ADApter via a forged cross-chain message. kelp emphasized that its own systems were not involved in the affected infrastructure, and said it is working with aave, layerzero, and other stakeholders to assess the impact, develop mitigation measures, and determine next steps for protocol recovery.

nitter.net/kelpdao/status/2046332…

news.title:
lido reports $21.6m rsETH exposure, may deploy $3m loss buffer

lido stated that its earnETH product
news.summary:
lido reports $21.6m rsETH exposure, may deploy $3m loss buffer

lido stated that its earnETH product has approximately 9% exposure to rsETH (~$21.6 million) via leveraged positions on aave following the april 18 kelp dao incident. loss outcomes depend on actions by kelp, layerzero, and aave. if necessary, lido may deploy a ~$3 million first-loss protection mechanism funded by its dao treasury. stETH and wstETH remain unaffected, and the core 스테이킹 protocol is not involved.

nitter.net/lidofinance/status/204…

news.title:
vitalik: l2s that only copy 이더리움 make no sense

이더리움 founder vitalik buterin @vitalikbuterin stated
news.summary:
vitalik: l2s that only copy 이더리움 make no sense

이더리움 founder vitalik buterin @vitalikbuterin stated during his speech at the 4th hong kong web3 festival on april 20 that an l2 that merely clones 이더리움 and makes it more centralized is meaningless. a truly meaningful l2 should examine application needs and build the required off-chain components outside of 이더리움 l1. 

furthermore, vitalik noted that future scaling remains a key focus: first, data scaling, which requires further advancing the peerdas technology introduced in a previous hard fork; second, compute scaling, which allows different applications to compose and communicate with each other without the need for any intermediaries.

video

news.title:
마켓이 계속 상승하는 배경에는...

수급적인 측면도 있지만,

매크로 면에서 환경이 개선되는 기대감이 있습니다. 

fci 완화, 유가는 호르무즈 개방 기대와 수요가 축소되며 하
news.summary:
마켓이 계속 상승하는 배경에는...

수급적인 측면도 있지만,

매크로 면에서 환경이 개선되는 기대감이 있습니다. 

fci 완화, 유가는 호르무즈 개방 기대와 수요가 축소되며 하락, ppi 예상치 하회. 

지금 시기가 지나고나면... 소비자 구매력이 살아날 여지가 있어 보이죠. 

마치 팬데믹 시절처럼.

호르무즈가 열리면 원자재 비용 압력도 추가로 빠질 가능성이 높습니다.

여기에 하나 더.. 11월은 중간선거입니다.

트럼프 입장에서 중간선거 전까지 주가 관리는 필수죠.

지금처럼 트럼프 지지율이 바닥인 상태에서... 

공화당 의석을 지키려면 경제가 좋아 보여야 하고, 

미국에서 경제를 설명하는 1번 지표는 S&P 500이니까요. 

실제로 트럼프는 이미 taco발 휴전 중재, 원유 가격 하락 같은 긍정적 발언으로 시장을 여러 차례 띄웠습니다. 

시장은 이걸 알고 있고.. 

그래서 "트럼프가 시장을 망가뜨리지 않을 것"이라는 암묵적 풋옵션처럼 작동하고 있습니다. 

앞으로 6개월, 정치적 유인이 유동성 기대와 맞물려 있는 구간입니다.

그동안 분석했듯이... 구조적 리스크도 분명히 있습니다. 

그리고.. 월말 리밸런싱 수요는 채권 쪽으로 쏠릴 가능성이 있습니다.

골드만 john flood의 표현이 지금 시장 분위기를 가장 잘 요약합니다. 

"이 정도면 좀 과한 느낌이다. 그로스 레버리지는 여전히 너무 높고, 넷 레버리지는 너무 낮다. 풀백의 완벽한 조건이 갖춰져 있다."

ai가 실제로 기업 이익을 확장시키고 있다는 증거가 계속 나온다면, 이제부터 진짜 새로운 사이클의 시작일 수 있습니다. 

반대로 이익 가시성 없이 포지셔닝 수급만으로 올라온 거라면, 되돌림은 생각보다 빠를 수 있습니다.

이제 답은 지금 쏟아지는 빅테크 실적에 있다는 말이겠죠.

news.title:
🚨🇺🇸🇮🇷🇵🇰 속보: the supreme leader gave the green light. vance flying to islamabad tuesday morning...

t
news.summary:
🚨🇺🇸🇮🇷🇵🇰 속보: the supreme leader gave the green light. vance flying to islamabad tuesday morning...

the internal struggle in tehran played out exactly as i'd been tracking.

the irgc pressured the negotiators to hold a firmer line and refuse talks until the blockade ended. 

pakistan, egypt, and turkey pushed iran to attend anyway. 

the team waited for a final decision from mojtaba khamenei. he said go.

트럼프 effectively extended the ceasefire by a day, now expiring wednesday evening instead of tuesday. 

that's the entire window.

one day in islamabad to either produce a framework or watch the bombs resume.

vance, witkoff, and kushner all flying in. 

same team as round one. different stakes entirely.

the first time around, the ceasefire was holding and both sides had time.

this time, the u.s. has a blockade running, iran is reclaiming missile launchers, and the deadline is hours away.

source: axios




mario nawfal (@marionawfal)

🇮🇷🇸🇦🇦🇪 iran is reportedly planning a single coordinated strike that could wipe out 32% of global oil supply.

the targets, according to tasnim news agency:
- yanbu pipeline in saudi arabia
- fujairah oil facility in the uae
- full houthi closure of the bab el-mandeb strait

if even half of this plays out alongside a hormuz blockade, the global energy market won’t adjust gradually and may collapse all at once.

bab el-mandeb alone handles roughly 6 million barrels a day.
fujairah is one of the world's largest bunkering hubs.
yanbu is the artery connecting saudi oil fields to the red sea.

hit all three simultaneously and you're looking at a structural rupture that would take months to stabilize, if it stabilizes at all.

source: tasnim news agency





— https://nitter.net/marionawfal/status/2046358122273370596#m

news.title:
🇨🇳 china has 70% more crude oil in reserve than the united states... that's not an accident

china's
news.summary:
🇨🇳 china has 70% more crude oil in reserve than the united states... that's not an accident

china's total crude inventories: 1,397 million barrels.

u.s. total crude inventories: 825 million barrels.

the structural difference is the real story.

america's 411 million barrels of commercial inventory are privately held and operate independently from the strategic petroleum reserve.

china's 1,038 million barrels of "commercial" inventory are held by state-owned national oil companies, meaning beijing effectively controls the entire stockpile.

add it up: the chinese government has direct or indirect command over nearly 1.4 billion barrels of oil.

the u.s. government controls 413 million.

now the timeline makes sense.

hormuz has been blocked since late february.

iranian oil shipments to china have slowed but not stopped.

and beijing has shown zero panic the entire war.

that's because beijing didn't react to this crisis. it spent a decade preparing for it.

the only question now is how long 1.4 billion barrels last. 

and what beijing does when the cushion runs thin.

@jackprandelli




mario nawfal (@marionawfal)

🚨🇨🇳 tungsten just spiked 640% in a year. almost nobody is talking about it...

the metal is used in armor-piercing tank rounds, bunker busters, artillery shells, and the warheads of every tomahawk cruise missile currently being fired in the middle east. 

highest melting point of any known element. 

nearly twice as dense as lead. 

it is the backbone of modern kinetic warfare.

china controls 83 to 85% of global supply and nearly all the processing.

the chart shows the smoking gun...

rotterdam prices are exploding while chinese domestic prices stayed flat. 

that's beijing deliberately choking off exports to the west while keeping the same metal cheap for its own defense industry.

the u.s. and nato burned through stockpiles supplying ukraine.

now they're burning through more sustaining the iran war.

congress can appropriate whatever it wants for munitions.

defense contractors physically cannot build the shells without tungsten.

everyone is watching the navy blockade iran.

china is running a quieter more devastating blockade on the metals that make every weapon the west fires.

source: bloomberg



video
  





— https://nitter.net/marionawfal/status/2046355858402267439#m

news.title:
massive buybacks are coming to the us market:

buyback authorizations across the russell 3000 급등d +3
news.summary:
massive buybacks are coming to the us market:

buyback authorizations across the russell 3000 급등d +36% yoy, to a record $428 billion so far in 2026.

authorizations are now +176% above the same period in 2020.

at a historical execution rate of ~90%, us corporates are now on track to repurchase a record ~$1 trillion in shares this year.

in 2 weeks, the corporate buyback window will reopen following the earnings blackout period.

this will bring an additional wave of demand for stocks at a time when the market is already experiencing a historic run.

us corporations are set to be major buyers in the equity market.

news.title:
the housing market is running out of buyers:

there were an estimated 46.3% more home sellers than b
news.summary:
the housing market is running out of buyers:

there were an estimated 46.3% more home sellers than buyers in february 2026, the biggest difference since redfin data began in 2013.

this gap has widened sharply from 29.8% a year ago, marking the strongest market for buyers in over a decade.

by comparison, there were a record 36.0% more buyers than sellers in november 2022.

this comes as the number of active homebuyers fell -2.4% mom, to ~1.36 million, the lowest since at least 2013.

at the same time, the number of sellers declined -0.4% mom to ~1.99 million, posting a smaller decrease than homebuyers.

further home price cuts are likely coming.

news.title:
us small businesses are pulling back on investment as if we are in a crisis:

in march, only 16% of
news.summary:
us small businesses are pulling back on investment as if we are in a crisis:

in march, only 16% of small businesses said that they plan on investing in capex over the next 6 months, the lowest reading since november 2009.

this percentage has declined -12 points since november 2024.

by comparison, the pre-2008 financial crisis and the 2020 pandemic levels were 30-35%.

furthermore, the proportion of firms investing in capex over the last 6 months has declined -9 points since january, and remains below the long-term historical average.

this comes as policy uncertainty and elevated energy costs are weighing on small businesses.

all while they cite taxes, quality of labor, and 인플레이션 as their most important problems.

small businesses are struggling in the us.

🇯🇵 earthquakes have struck hokkaido, aomori, and iwate in japan, with a tsunami warning currently in effect. 

fishing vessels are evacuating offshore. 

a 7.4 magnitude quake occurred offshore at a depth of 10 km, with a tsunami warning of 3m for iwate and hokkaido.

visegrád 24 (@visegrad24)

🇫🇷🇦🇫 french authorities have arrested a 19-ye
news.summary:
no editorializing needed.


visegrád 24 (@visegrad24)

🇫🇷🇦🇫 french authorities have arrested a 19-year-old afghan migrant accused of a series of brutal sexual assaults on goats and sheep at a farm near marseille, france.

the investigation began after the owners of the farm discovered several of their animals in severe distress with their legs tied and bleeding from genital injuries. one of the victims is a five-month-old lamb that nearly lost its life from the afghan teen's abuse.

surveillance cameras captured the young migrant performing violent sexual acts with the animals.

he was caught in the act and taken into custody. while the suspect has reportedly denied the accusations, prosecutors stated that dna evidence from semen samples found on six of the animals matches him.





— https://nitter.net/visegrad24/status/2046367148478693646#m

news.title: 🇫🇷🇦🇫 french authorities have arrested a 19-year-old afghan migrant accused of a series of brutal sex
news.summary:
🇫🇷🇦🇫 french authorities have arrested a 19-year-old afghan migrant accused of a series of brutal sexual assaults on goats and sheep at a farm near marseille, france.

the investigation began after the owners of the farm discovered several of their animals in severe distress with their legs tied and bleeding from genital injuries. one of the victims is a five-month-old lamb that nearly lost its life from the afghan teen's abuse.

surveillance cameras captured the young migrant performing violent sexual acts with the animals.

he was caught in the act and taken into custody. while the suspect has reportedly denied the accusations, prosecutors stated that dna evidence from semen samples found on six of the animals matches him.

news.summary:
anger in italy after an illegal immigrant from africa was filmed killing and trying to cook a cat on a makeshift grate near a children’s playground in la spezia.

the police intervened quickly, charging him with animal cruelty after 알림s from shocked onlookers 🇮🇹

news.title: 🇵🇱 thousands of people, including poland’s conservative president karol nawrocki, took part in yeste
news.summary:
🇵🇱 thousands of people, including poland’s conservative president karol nawrocki, took part in yesterday’s national march for life in warsaw.

the march, which is one of the largest pro-life gatherings in europe, took place under the slogan “faith and fidelity 966–2026,” referring to the 1,060th anniversary of the “baptism of poland,” when poland’s first ruler, prince mieszko, was baptised.

nawrocki called the march “a beautiful initiative that shows how evil can be overcome with good.”

“today, the answer to many polish problems lies precisely in polish families, in our identity, in remembering where we come from and where we are going,” said the president.

news.title: more whites were brought as slaves to north africa than blacks brought as slaves to the united state
news.summary:
more whites were brought as slaves to north africa than blacks brought as slaves to the united states.

- thomas sowell

news.title: "our civilization is the greatest achievement in human history – the fruit of centuries of struggle
news.summary:
"our civilization is the greatest achievement in human history – the fruit of centuries of struggle and sacrifice by our european ancestors. 

it is here that the ideals of democracy and human rights were imagined, defended and realized," 

said geert wilders, president of the dutch partij voor de vrijheid. 🇳🇱

news.title: 🇪🇸 the far-left spanish prime minister, pedro sánchez, has stood firm on his government's decision t
news.summary:
🇪🇸 the far-left spanish prime minister, pedro sánchez, has stood firm on his government's decision to regularize up to 1.3 million illegal migrants.

"we are the children of migration in spain; we will not be the parents of xenophobia," he said, also adding that he is "proud to be on the right side of history."

the decision by the spanish government has led to widespread condemnation from the right wing, not just in spain but across europe, including calls to suspend the schengen area.

once the 1.3 million illegal migrants in spain have their stay regularized, they will be able to freely travel anywhere within the schengen area.
